title: AXDrawingUtil
description: Utility class for drawing operations, geometric calculations, and canvas manipulation.

types.title: AXDrawingUtil
types.description: Comprehensive drawing utility class that provides methods for geometric calculations, canvas operations, and drawing primitives.

methods.name: drawLine
methods.description: Draws a line between two points on a canvas context.

methods.name: drawRectangle
methods.description: Draws a rectangle with specified dimensions and position.

methods.name: drawCircle
methods.description: Draws a circle with specified radius and center point.

methods.name: drawEllipse
methods.description: Draws an ellipse with specified dimensions and center point.

methods.name: drawPolygon
methods.description: Draws a polygon with specified vertices.

methods.name: drawArc
methods.description: Draws an arc with specified radius, start angle, and end angle.

methods.name: drawText
methods.description: Draws text at a specified position with custom styling.

methods.name: clearCanvas
methods.description: Clears the entire canvas or a specified region.

methods.name: getBoundingBox
methods.description: Calculates the bounding box for a set of points or shapes.

methods.name: isPointInShape
methods.description: Checks if a point is inside a specified shape.

methods.name: calculateDistance
methods.description: Calculates the distance between two points.

methods.name: calculateAngle
methods.description: Calculates the angle between two points or vectors.

methods.name: rotatePoint
methods.description: Rotates a point around a center point by a specified angle.

methods.name: scalePoint
methods.description: Scales a point by a specified factor from a center point.

methods.name: getIntersection
methods.description: Calculates the intersection point of two lines.
